name: Surf N Salsa
tagline: Handmade corn tortillas and house-made salsa in a food truck on Kamehameha Highway — the fish tacos here make you question why you ever ate elsewhere.
mustOrder: Fish tacos — fresh catch in handmade corn tortillas with house salsa
Carnitas tacos — slow-cooked pork, tender and well-seasoned
Housemade salsa — get the hot if you can handle it
parking: Dirt pulloff lot right next to the truck
talkStory: A roadside food truck on Kamehameha Highway near Haleiwa run by a Mexican-American family that built a cult following with North Shore surfers. The tortillas are handmade daily, the fish changes based on the morning catch, and the green salsa is the sleeper hit. Lines build at lunchtime so going slightly off-peak pays off. Closed Sundays. One of the few spots doing real-deal Mexican food on the North Shore.
